ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the stock exchange */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Time the stock exchange opens */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Time the stock exchange closes */,
  "trading_days" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of trading days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company (e.g., AAPL, IBM) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on that date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price after the market closes */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data (e.g., stock exchange, financial news outlet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the news article is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market analysis report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the market analysis report is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the market analysis report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the market analysis report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the market analysis report was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market analysis report */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the market analysis report */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the market analysis report */,
  "predictions" TEXT /* Predictions or forecasts included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was granted */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission expires (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_companies" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_daily" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on that date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price after the market closes */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data (e.g., stock exchange, financial news outlet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_daily_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_weekly" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on that date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price after the market closes */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous week */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data (e.g., stock exchange, financial news outlet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_weekly_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_monthly" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on that date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price after the market closes */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous month */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data (e.g., stock exchange, financial news outlet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_monthly_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_yearly" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on that date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price after the market closes */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data (e.g., stock exchange, financial news outlet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_yearly_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
